title: Pod CrashLoopBackOff -> payment-api
summary: The payment-api pod has been restarting repeatedly due to memory exhaustion. OOMKilled errors detected 4 times in the last 30 minutes.
suggestion: Increase the memory limit for the payment-api container from 512MB to at least 1GB. Review the database query on PaymentService that loads unbounded result sets.

title: High CPU usage -> nginx-xyz
summary: A CPU spike was detected on the nginx pod reaching 95% usage for approximately 3 minutes before stabilizing. No service disruption occurred.
suggestion: Monitor for recurrence. If CPU spikes again consider reviewing nginx worker process configuration.

title: Service unavailable -> orders-db
summary: The orders database pod is completely down. All dependent services are failing to connect.
suggestion: Check persistent volume claim status. Run kubectl describe pod orders-db-0 to identify the root cause. Consider restoring from the last healthy snapshot.

logs.message: Pod failed to start — PVC mount error
